feed.title: Kennebec County Registry of Deeds
feed.subtitle: No dedicated registry news/RSS feed exists; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official registry page. Minimal static page; monitors sidebar contact/hours content and sitewide notification banner.

entry.title: Page updated: Kennebec County Registry of Deeds
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Removed: - County offices will be closed Friday, July 3 - rd - in observance of Independence Day
